THE CLARITY TOOL
Exponential growth can be achieved when you know your destination before you begin. This tool
is great at the beginning of the mastermind. People very quickly will know where they are, where
they want to go and why. If you know where you are, where you want to go, and why you want it -
the only part left is the the capabilities to get there. This is the “how”. This is what they will learn at
your mastermind.
1. CURRENT STATUS (THE TRUTH)
4. CAPABILITIES NEEDED TO ACHIEVE GOALS
